title: Debugging session: login test regression
body:
Previous debugging findings:
- Test `test_login_success` fails with 401 Unauthorized instead of expected 200.
- Trace shows `Authorization` header is absent in the test request.
- Root cause hint: the test's `client` fixture does not attach a valid auth token. The helper `create_test_user()` generates a user but the token retrieval call `get_auth_token(user)` was commented out in a recent refactor (commit abc123).
- Suggested fix direction: re-enable the token retrieval and attach it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` in the test headers, or alternatively mock the auth middleware for unit tests.

title: Sprint planning retro
body: Discussed login module stability. Noted that the login test suite currently has 3 failing tests all related to authentication header setup. Priority to fix before release.
